steps.title: Approve an Order
steps.content: A customer has placed an order! Tap on this pending order card to see the details, then tap Approve to start preparing it.

steps.title: Mark Ready
steps.content: Great! The drink is now being prepared. Once it's done, tap the order card and tap Ready to notify the customer.

steps.title: Collect Order
steps.content: The customer is here to pick up! Tap the ready order and tap Collected to complete it.

steps.title: Walk-up Order
steps.content: A customer at the counter wants to order. Tap the Walk-up button to create an order directly.

steps.title: Toggle Menu Items
steps.content: Sold out of something? Tap Menu to enable or disable items for today.

steps.title: Stock Count
steps.content: Time to count stock! Tap Stock Count and submit your count.

steps.title: Close the Café
steps.content: Last step! At the end of service, tap Café Open to close. This ends ordering for the day.
